tQTLExperiment 0.1.29
  • Get started
  • Reference

Interactive cis-QTL browser

Source: R/run_cis_qtl_browser.R
run_cis_qtl_browser.Rd

Launches a Shiny application for exploring cis-QTL associations. Users can select genes, view associated SNPs, and visualize the genotype effect on phenotypes using plotGenotypeEffect().

Usage

run_cis_qtl_browser(
  tqe,
  cis_gr,
  gene_col = "gene_symbol",
  snp_col = "variant_id",
  phenotype_col = "phenotype_id",
  pval_col = "pval_nominal",
  pval_thresh = NULL
)

Arguments

tqe

A tQTLExperiment with genotype data.

cis_gr

A GenomicRanges::GRanges object containing cis-QTL results (e.g., from readTQTL()).

gene_col

Name of the metadata column in cis_gr containing gene symbols. Default: "gene_symbol".

snp_col

Name of the metadata column in cis_gr containing SNP IDs. Default: "variant_id".

phenotype_col

Name of the metadata column in cis_gr containing phenotype/gene IDs. Default: "phenotype_id".

pval_col

Name of the metadata column in cis_gr containing p-values. Default: "pval_nominal".

pval_thresh

Optional numeric threshold for filtering associations by p-value. If NULL (default), all associations are included.

Value

A Shiny application object (invisibly). Call this function in an interactive R session to launch the browser.

Details

The browser provides two tabs:

  • Genotype effect: Beeswarm plot of phenotype values by SNP genotype, generated by plotGenotypeEffect().

  • cis associations: Filterable data table of all associations for the selected gene.

Navigation is via dropdown menus: select a gene symbol (searchable), then a cis-SNP for that gene, then click "Plot" to visualize.

Examples

if (interactive()) {
  # Load MAGE chr17 genotypes and pre-computed tensorQTL results
  plink_paths <- cache_mage_chr17_plink(verbose = FALSE)
  plpre <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(plink_paths[["bed"]])
  data(mageSEfilt, package="CSHLvc2026")
  cd <- as.data.frame(colData(mageSEfilt))
  mm <- model.matrix(~ factor(batch) + population + sex, data = cd)
  mm <- mm[, -1, drop = FALSE]   # remove (Intercept)
  tqe <- tQTLExperimentFromRSE(
   se              = mageSEfilt,
   plinkPrefix     = plpre,
   covariateMatrix = mm,
   genome          = "hg38"
   )
  tqe <- addGeneSymbols(tqe)
  demd = cache_demo_data()
  res <- readTQTL(dirname(demd$parquet), mode = "cis_nominal", x = tqe)
  newpairs = res$pairs
  newpairs = annotateTensorQTLResults(newpairs)

  # Launch browser with p-value filter
  run_cis_qtl_browser(tqe, newpairs, pval_thresh = 0.05)
}
